response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior-level fullstack engineer with 15+ years of professional experience, clear TypeScript/Node.js/React depth, hands-on cloud and containerization experience, and a current role explicitly involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a direct match for the AI agent development requirement. The primary gap is the absence of Nest.js, which is listed as a core stack technology, and no explicit mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite a strong general TDD culture. These are learnable gaps for a candidate of this seniority, making an interview worthwhile to assess depth and Nest.js proximity.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP framework experience at current Naver role, matching a rare requirement explicitly called out in the JD
15+ years of polyglot fullstack engineering with demonstrated TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes usage across multiple production environments

Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, published testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and Selenium course instructor — signals testing discipline even without explicit Vitest/Playwright mentions
concerns: No mention of Nest.js anywhere on the resume, yet it is listed as a primary stack technology; unclear whether he has proximity to it or would require significant ramp-up

Required testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are absent from the resume; testing experience is evident but tied to D-language tooling and general TDD practice rather than the JS ecosystem tools specified
Kotlin is not listed in skills or work history despite being called out as a secondary technology; Java appears only briefly in embedded/robotics context, not in backend service development
